topics.label: Product Management
topics.description: Discover value, validate assumptions, define requirements, and create an accepted delivery plan.

topics.label: Software Architecture
topics.description: Shape system boundaries, contracts, data, services, and reviewable architecture decisions.

topics.label: Engineering Quality
topics.description: Implement accepted behavior with repository alignment, tests, debugging, and independent review.

topics.label: Security Engineering
topics.description: Model threats, implement secure boundaries, verify independently, and operate residual risk.

topics.label: Design & UI
topics.description: Plan, create, refine, and verify usable visual and interaction systems.

topics.label: Agent Workflows
topics.description: Route work through explicit lifecycle ownership, role composition, quality gates, and learning.

topics.label: AI & Agent Systems
topics.description: Design models, prompts, context, runtime boundaries, and AI-native product integrations.

topics.label: Operations & Reliability
topics.description: Release, observe, protect, recover, and learn from production behavior.

topics.label: Developer Experience
topics.description: Improve repository onboarding, implementation discovery, planning, tooling, and delivery ergonomics.

topics.label: Growth & Marketing
topics.description: Create positioning, content, brand expression, and conversion-oriented experiences.
